decision_rationale: Best F1-macro vs latency vs size trade-off among 4 candidates (see nhanh1_architecture_comparison.json, run on 6-class data incl. stacked); F1 differences negligible.
update_note: 16/7: stacked class (5) removed from training (100% synthetic, 100% recall across all candidates = trivially separable, not a real quality signal). This eval reflects the 5-class retrain. A metric bug (hardcoded label list corrupting macro-avg with a phantom 0-support class) was found and fixed in scripts/train_nhanh1.py + compare_nhanh1_architectures.py - see data_contract.md Muc 3.3.
caveats: boolean_blind class has ~13% measured label noise (see data_contract.md Muc 3.1).
True robustness must be measured on the Day-7 adversarial test set, not this clean test split.
stacked class excluded from training (16/7) - see data_contract.md Muc 3.3.
